title: Sarcoglottis sancta
taxonomy: Sarcoglottis sancta belongs to the family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the orchid family. This plant is a species of orchid native to tropical regions. It is a terrestrial orchid and is often found in shaded areas. The classification of Sarcoglottis sancta places it in the genus Sarcoglottis, which is a group of orchids with unique characteristics. Sarcoglottis sancta is further classified as a flowering plant, specifically within the kingdom Plantae.
uses: Sarcoglottis sancta is known for its traditional medicinal uses in various parts of the world.
